title: Survey of Primary Filtering based on Blood Test Using Artificial Intelligence Model for Covid-19
author: Vijay K
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: It is critical to identify persons who have already been infected with COVID-19 in order to control the virus's spread. The gold standard for COVID-19 identification is rRT- PCR (reverse transcription polymerase chain reaction) testing, although it is a time-consuming, labor-intensive manual technique that is in short supply. We will offer a viable method for COVID-19 preliminary patient filtration based on frequent blood tests, utilising artificial intelligence (AI) models, in this post in order to reduce the number of tests. Using Automatic AI, our auto-adaptive AI platform, the most suited AI model will be chosen.

Using Automatic AI, our auto-adaptive AI platform, the most suited AI model will be chosen.
keywords: AI; Covid-19; Other Virus; Prevention; challenges; Time and Medicine waste; etc.
